
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
#=================================
#1. Load required packages and input data
#=================================
# Statistics-only script for testing whether nerve-level mean DRAXIN differs
# across nerve categories while adjusting for patient_id as a fixed effect.

library(SpatialExperiment)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(S4Vectors)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(broom)

# Load integrated spatial object
spe <- readRDS("../../../../../Konstantina/12_Olas_project/Publication_files/data/SPE/Integrated_NMF.rds")

# Load accompanying metadata
colData(spe) <- DataFrame(read.csv("../../../../../Konstantina/12_Olas_project/Publication_files/data/coldata/DE_SPE_annotaion.csv"))

# Ensure column names match barcodes
colnames(spe) <- spe$barcode
```

```{r}
#=================================
#2. Define nerve metadata
#=================================
# Keep only nerve spots and define the 3 nerve categories:
# - NonInvaded_Adjacent
# - NonInvaded_Diseased
# - Invaded

spe_nerve <- spe[, colData(spe)$is.nerve == TRUE]

nerve_meta_df <- data.frame(
  barcode    = as.character(spe_nerve$barcode),
  patient_id = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$patient_id),
  NerveID    = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$NerveID),
  Invaded    = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$Invaded),
  type_raw   = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$type),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

nerve_meta_df <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  mutate(
    types_grouped = ifelse(type_raw == "noPNI", "Adjacent", "Diseased"),
    nerve_category = ifelse(
      Invaded == "NonInvaded",
      paste0("NonInvaded_", types_grouped),
      Invaded
    ),
    patient_id = factor(patient_id, levels = c("54703", "6249", "70865")),
    nerve_category = factor(
      nerve_category,
      levels = c("NonInvaded_Adjacent", "NonInvaded_Diseased", "Invaded")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(barcode),
    !is.na(patient_id),
    !is.na(NerveID),
    NerveID != "",
    !is.na(nerve_category)
  )
```

```{r}
#=================================
#2. Define nerve metadata
#=================================
# Keep only nerve spots and define the 3 nerve categories:
# - NonInvaded_Adjacent
# - NonInvaded_Diseased
# - Invaded

spe_nerve <- spe[, colData(spe)$is.nerve == TRUE]

nerve_meta_df <- data.frame(
  barcode    = as.character(spe_nerve$barcode),
  patient_id = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$patient_id),
  NerveID    = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$NerveID),
  Invaded    = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$Invaded),
  type_raw   = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$type),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

nerve_meta_df <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  mutate(
    types_grouped = ifelse(type_raw == "noPNI", "Adjacent", "Diseased"),
    nerve_category = ifelse(
      Invaded == "NonInvaded",
      paste0("NonInvaded_", types_grouped),
      Invaded
    ),
    patient_id = factor(patient_id, levels = c("54703", "6249", "70865")),
    nerve_category = factor(
      nerve_category,
      levels = c("NonInvaded_Adjacent", "NonInvaded_Diseased", "Invaded")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(barcode),
    !is.na(patient_id),
    !is.na(NerveID),
    NerveID != "",
    !is.na(nerve_category)
  )
```


```{r}
#=================================
#3. Extract DRAXIN expression
#=================================
# DRAXIN is extracted from the logcounts assay.

if (!"logcounts" %in% assayNames(spe)) {
  stop("The assay 'logcounts' was not found in spe.")
}

if (!"DRAXIN" %in% rownames(spe)) {
  stop("DRAXIN was not found in rownames(spe).")
}

draxin_df <- data.frame(
  barcode = as.character(spe$barcode),
  DRAXIN = as.numeric(assay(spe, "logcounts")["DRAXIN", ]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

```

```{r}
#=================================
#4. Aggregate DRAXIN to nerve level
#=================================
# The nerve is the statistical unit.
# This avoids treating multiple spots from the same nerve as independent.

spot_df <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  left_join(draxin_df, by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(DRAXIN))

nerve_level_df <- spot_df %>%
  group_by(patient_id, NerveID, nerve_category) %>%
  summarise(
    DRAXIN = mean(DRAXIN, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_spots = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DRAXIN)) %>%
  droplevels()

cat("\nNumber of nerve-level observations:\n")
print(nrow(nerve_level_df))

cat("\nNerves per patient and nerve category:\n")
print(table(nerve_level_df$patient_id, nerve_level_df$nerve_category))

cat("\nSummary of nerve-level DRAXIN by category:\n")
print(
  nerve_level_df %>%
    group_by(nerve_category) %>%
    summarise(
      n_nerves = n(),
      mean_DRAXIN = mean(DRAXIN, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_DRAXIN = sd(DRAXIN, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_DRAXIN = median(DRAXIN, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
)

```


```{r}
#=================================
#5. Patient-adjusted linear model
#=================================
# Model:
# DRAXIN ~ patient_id + nerve_category
#
# patient_id is included as a fixed effect because there are only 3 patients.
# The main test of interest is nerve_category.

if (nlevels(nerve_level_df$patient_id) < 2) {
  stop("Fewer than 2 patients are present after filtering.")
}

if (nlevels(nerve_level_df$nerve_category) < 2) {
  stop("Fewer than 2 nerve categories are present after filtering.")
}

fit_draxin_nerve <- lm(
  DRAXIN ~ patient_id + nerve_category,
  data = nerve_level_df
)

cat("\nModel summary:\n")
print(summary(fit_draxin_nerve))

cat("\nModel alias check:\n")
print(alias(fit_draxin_nerve))

```

```{r}
#=================================
#6. Patient-adjusted ANOVA
#=================================
# Type II ANOVA tests nerve_category after accounting for patient_id.

anova_draxin_nerve <- car::Anova(
  fit_draxin_nerve,
  type = 2
)

cat("\nType II ANOVA, adjusted for patient_id:\n")
print(anova_draxin_nerve)

anova_draxin_nerve_df <- as.data.frame(anova_draxin_nerve)
anova_draxin_nerve_df$term <- rownames(anova_draxin_nerve_df)
anova_draxin_nerve_df <- anova_draxin_nerve_df %>%
  select(term, everything())

```

```{r}
#=================================
#7. Patient-adjusted estimated marginal means
#=================================
# Estimated marginal means compare nerve categories after adjusting for patient_id.

emm_draxin_nerve <- emmeans(
  fit_draxin_nerve,
  ~ nerve_category
)

cat("\nPatient-adjusted estimated marginal means:\n")
print(emm_draxin_nerve)

emm_draxin_nerve_df <- as.data.frame(emm_draxin_nerve)

```


```{r}
#=================================
#8. Pairwise comparisons between nerve categories
#=================================
# Holm correction is used for the 3 pairwise comparisons.

pairwise_draxin_nerve <- pairs(
  emm_draxin_nerve,
  adjust = "holm"
)

cat("\nPairwise patient-adjusted comparisons, Holm-adjusted:\n")
print(pairwise_draxin_nerve)

pairwise_draxin_nerve_df <- as.data.frame(pairwise_draxin_nerve)

```

```{r}
#=================================
#9. Basic model diagnostics
#=================================

model_summary_df <- broom::glance(fit_draxin_nerve)

cat("\nModel diagnostics summary:\n")
print(model_summary_df)

if (length(residuals(fit_draxin_nerve)) >= 3) {
  shapiro_res <- shapiro.test(residuals(fit_draxin_nerve))
  cat("\nShapiro-Wilk test on model residuals:\n")
  print(shapiro_res)

  shapiro_df <- data.frame(
    statistic = unname(shapiro_res$statistic),
    p_value = shapiro_res$p.value,
    method = shapiro_res$method
  )
} else {
  shapiro_df <- data.frame(
    statistic = NA_real_,
    p_value = NA_real_,
    method = "Not enough residuals for Shapiro-Wilk test"
  )
}

```

```{r}
#=================================
#10. Save statistics outputs
#=================================

write.csv(
  nerve_level_df,
  "stats_Draxin/DRAXIN_nerve_level_input_table.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  anova_draxin_nerve_df,
  "stats_Draxin/DRAXIN_nerve_level_patient_adjusted_ANOVA.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  emm_draxin_nerve_df,
  "stats_Draxin/DRAXIN_nerve_level_patient_adjusted_EMMeans.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  pairwise_draxin_nerve_df,
  "stats_Draxin/DRAXIN_nerve_level_patient_adjusted_pairwise.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  model_summary_df,
  "stats_Draxin/DRAXIN_nerve_level_model_diagnostics.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  shapiro_df,
  "stats_Draxin/DRAXIN_nerve_level_residual_shapiro_test.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```
